# Purchase and Delivery

Digital gift cards are sent by email to the recipient in under fifteen minutes of order, while physical gift cards ship as a standard parcel and follow the usual shipment timelines. A gift card can be scheduled to deliver on a future date up to one year ahead, which is useful for birthdays and holidays.

[Source: gift_cards.md#purchase-and-delivery]
